chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْإِيمَانَ يَشْرَكُ الْإِسْلَامَ وَ الْإِسْلَامَ لَا يَشْرَكُ الْإِيمَانَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – The Emān (belief) contains the Islām, but the Islām doest not contain the Emān (belief)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/153)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/153)
text: الْإِيمَانُ يُشَارِكُ الْإِسْلَامَ وَ الْإِسْلَامُ لَا يُشَارِكُ الْإِيمَانَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus Bin Abdul Rahman, from Musa Bin Bakr, from Fuzayl Bin Yasaar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Al-Emān contains the Al-Islām, but Al-Islām does not contain Al-Emān’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus ibn ‘Abd al- Rahman from Musa ibn Bakr from Fudayl ibn Yasar from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Belief is inclusive of Islam but Islam is not inclusive of belief.”
